meta.title: DEF CON 32 -  How we built our REDACTED THING this year, 5n4ck3y, && AMA Badge Panel -  AND!XOR
meta.description: See talk title, kids these days dont read more than a sentence anyway. Seriously though, we get asked a lot of random custom electronics, hardware hacking, and badge questions, here's your chance to throw them at us while we drink a beer and pretend to know the right answer
